name: Smoked Salmon Cheeseball
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and roll into a ball.
2. Roll in either chopped nuts or chives. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to use.
3. Serves 4 to 6 people as an hors d'oeuvre. (If smoked salmon is unavailable, use canned salmon and 1/8 teaspoon of liquid smoke. Use more liquid smoke if you prefer a stronger flavor.)
